raw_consumer_statement: In XX/XX/year> I was charged {$130.00} for parking my car rental in a paid parking spot with my XXXX XXXX as I am a XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX. According to federal XXXX regulations, I am exempt from paid XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX I explained the situation to XXXX when I returned the vehicle and they said it was no problem Months later I get this charge saying XXXX paid for the parking ticket and because it was already paid, I could not get a refund from the parking authorities. XXXX took that money from my AMEX card. I disputed it with Amex and explained the situation and they told me that they would remove the charge. However, recently I received an e-mail stating that the charge will be re-applied to my account. Despite nothing having changed.
